✅ AI Agent Orchestration
✅ Workflow Automation

✅ Streaming and structured output for agents
✅ Support for 14 LLM providers
✅ Extensive tool integration (including sub-workflows)
✅ 8 Memory backends
✅ 12 types of Guardrails
✅ Native Knowledge Base and RAG with 15+ vector store integrations
✅ MCP (Multi-cloud Platform) integration for tool consumption and exposure
✅ Self-hosted deployment
✅ Embeddable into other products

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

ByteChef is an open-source platform that unifies AI agent orchestration and workflow automation. It allows for the creation and management of complex AI agents with integrated tools, memory, and guardrails, alongside a visual workflow editor for automating tasks. This platform is designed for enterprises, offering self-hosted deployment and embeddability into other products.

𝗣𝗢𝗞𝗜𝗘𝗧𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗥 | To provide stock market beginners with an event-driven understanding of stock price fluctuations by correlating news events with price movements and offering AI-driven explanations and predictions.  📈 Growing!

📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

✅ Find similar events
✅ AI explains price moves
✅ Predict trends

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

PokieTicker is a Python application that helps users understand the 'why' behind stock price movements by integrating news events directly onto candlestick charts. It allows for filtering news by impact type, finding similar historical events, and uses AI to explain price changes and predict future trends based on news sentiment and technical indicators.

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To display a user's currently playing or recently played music tracks from Last.FM as a dynamic SVG image within a GitHub repository's README file.
📅 Created: Jun 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

✅ Customizable with user and test parameters
✅ Designed for GitHub README integration
✅ Self-hosting option available

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This Python tool generates a customizable SVG card displaying a user's most recently played tracks on Last.FM. It's designed to be easily integrated into GitHub README files, providing a dynamic visual representation of listening habits.

𝗔𝗥𝗖𝗔𝗗𝗘_𝗔𝗜 | To provide a unified and user-friendly mobile interface for interacting with a wide range of Large Language Models from different providers on Android devices.  🔍 Worth a Look

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📊 Dart 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a unified and user-friendly mobile interface for interacting with a wide range of Large Language Models from different providers on Android devices.
📅 Created: Jun 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ 12 built-in providers + custom endpoint support
✅ Streaming responses
✅ Reasoning view for complex models
✅ Vision capabilities (image input)
✅ Model comparison feature
✅ Bilingual UI (English/Russian)
✅ Secure API key storage (Android Keystore)
✅ Optional biometric auto-lock
✅ Crafted dark design with animations


◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Arcade AI is a universal Android chat client that connects to multiple Large Language Models (LLMs) from various providers. It offers a fluid, secure, and customizable interface for interacting with different AI models, including global, regional, and local options.

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

𝗠𝗘𝗦𝗛-𝗠𝗔𝗥𝗞𝗘𝗧 | Synchronizing files and folders directly between personal devices without relying on cloud storage or a central server.  🔍 Worth a Look

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📊 Dart 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Synchronizing files and folders directly between personal devices without relying on cloud storage or a central server.
📅 Created: Jun 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Direct device-to-device folder syncing
✅ Decentralized peer discovery (mDNS, BitTorrent DHT)
✅ Secure data transfer (WebRTC, XChaCha20-Poly1305 encryption)
✅ Conflict detection and resolution
✅ Background operation
✅ Cross-platform support (Android, iOS, macOS, Linux, Windows)


╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Mesh Market is a decentralized file synchronization tool that allows users to sync folders directly between their own devices without a central server. It uses various peer-to-peer technologies for discovery and secure data transfer, ensuring end-to-end encryption.
